name: Ability Score Improvement
description:
Increase one ability score of your choice by 2, or increase two ability scores of your choice by 1. This feat can't increase an ability score above 20.

**Repeatable.** You can take this feat more than once.

name: Actor
description:
Increase your Charisma score by 1, to a maximum of 20. You gain the following benefits.

**Impersonation.** While you're disguised as a real or fictional person, you have {rule:Advantage} on Charisma ({skill:Deception} or {skill:Performance}) checks to convince others that you are that person.

**Mimicry.** You can mimic the sounds of other creatures, including speech. A creature that hears the mimicry must succeed on a Wisdom ({skill:Insight}) check to determine the effect is faked (DC 8 plus your Charisma modifier and Proficiency Bonus).

properties.text: While disguised as a real or fictional person, you have advantage on Charisma (Deception or Performance) checks to convince others you are that person.
You can mimic the sounds of other creatures, including speech. DC 8 + Charisma modifier + Proficiency Bonus Wisdom (Insight) check to detect the mimicry.

name: Alert
description:
You gain the following benefits.

**Initiative Proficiency.** When you roll {rule:Initiative}, you can add your Proficiency Bonus to the roll.

**Initiative Swap.** Immediately after you roll {rule:Initiative}, you can swap your Initiative with the Initiative of one willing ally in the same combat. You can't make this swap if you or the ally has the {condition:Incapacitated} condition.

properties.text: After rolling Initiative, you can swap your result with one willing ally's result, unless either of you has the Incapacitated condition.

name: Archery
description: You gain a +2 bonus to attack rolls you make with Ranged weapons.

name: Artificer Initiate
description: You've learned some of an artificer's inventiveness. You learn one cantrip of your choice from the Artificer spell list, and you learn one 1st-level spell of your choice from that list. Intelligence is your spellcasting ability for these spells. You can cast this feat's 1st-level spell without a spell slot, and you must finish a {rule:Long Rest} before you can cast it in this way again. You can also cast the spell using any spell slots you have. You gain proficiency with one type of artisan's tools of your choice, and you can use that type of tool as a spellcasting focus for any spell you cast that uses Intelligence as its spellcasting ability.

properties.text: Learn one Artificer cantrip and one Artificer 1st-level spell. Intelligence is your spellcasting ability. The 1st-level spell can be cast once per long rest without a spell slot, and also using any spell slots you have.
Gain proficiency with one artisan's tool of your choice, usable as a spellcasting focus for Intelligence-based spells.

choices.label: Artificer Cantrip
choices.description: Choose one cantrip from the Artificer spell list. Intelligence is your spellcasting ability for it.

options.label: Any Artificer cantrip
options.description: Select one cantrip (level 0 spell) from the Artificer spell list.

choices.label: Artificer 1st-Level Spell
choices.description: Choose one 1st-level spell from the Artificer spell list. Intelligence is your spellcasting ability. You can cast it once per long rest without a spell slot, and also using any spell slots you have.

options.label: Any Artificer 1st-level spell
options.description: Select one 1st-level spell from the Artificer spell list.

name: Athlete
description:
You gain the following benefits.

**Climb Speed.** You gain a Climb Speed equal to your Speed.

**Hop Up.** When you have the {condition:Prone} condition, you can right yourself with only 5 feet of movement.

**Jumping.** You can make a running Long Jump or High Jump after moving only 5 feet.

properties.text: Climb Speed equals your Speed.
While Prone, you can stand up using only 5 feet of movement.
You can make a running Long Jump or High Jump after moving only 5 feet.

name: Blessed Warrior
description: You learn two Cleric cantrips of your choice. {spell:Guidance} and {spell:Sacred Flame} are recommended. The chosen cantrips count as Paladin spells for you, and Charisma is your spellcasting ability for them. Whenever you gain a Paladin level, you can replace one of these cantrips with another Cleric cantrip.

options.label: Any Cleric cantrip
options.description: Choose any cantrip from the Cleric spell list. Charisma is your spellcasting ability for it.

properties.text: The two chosen Cleric cantrips use Charisma as the spellcasting ability and count as Paladin spells. You can replace one at each Paladin level.

name: Blind Fighting
description: You have Blindsight with a range of 10 feet.

name: Boon of Combat Prowess
description:
You gain the following benefits.

**Ability Score Increase.** Increase one ability score of your choice by 1, to a maximum of 30.

**Peerless Aim.** When you miss with an attack roll, you can hit instead. Once you use this benefit, you can't use it again until the start of your next turn.

properties.text: Peerless Aim: When you miss with an attack roll, you can hit instead. Once per turn.

name: Boon of Dimensional Travel
description:
You gain the following benefits.

**Ability Score Increase.** Increase one ability score of your choice by 1, to a maximum of 30.

**Blink Steps.** Immediately after you take the {action:Attack} action or the {action:Magic} action, you can teleport up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space you can see.

properties.text: Blink Steps: Immediately after you take the Attack action or the Magic action, you can teleport up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space you can see.

name: Boon of Energy Resistance
description:
You gain the following benefits.

**Ability Score Increase.** Increase one ability score of your choice by 1, to a maximum of 30.

**Energy Resistances.** You gain {rule:Resistance|resistance} to two of the following damage types of your choice: Acid, Cold, Fire, Lightning, Necrotic, Poison, Psychic, Radiant, or Thunder. Whenever you finish a Long Rest, you can change your choices.

**Energy Redirection.** When you take damage of one of the types chosen for the Energy Resistances benefit, you can take a Reaction to direct damage of the same type toward another creature you can see within 60 feet of yourself that isn't behind Total Cover. If you do so, that creature must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw (DC 8 plus your Constitution modifier and Proficiency Bonus) or take damage equal to 2d12 plus your Constitution modifier.

properties.text: Energy Resistances: Choose 2 damage types from Acid, Cold, Fire, Lightning, Necrotic, Poison, Psychic, Radiant, Thunder. You have resistance to those types. You can change choices on a Long Rest.

Energy Redirection: When you take one of your chosen damage types, you can use your Reaction to direct damage of the same type at a creature you can see within 60 feet (not behind Total Cover). The creature makes a Dexterity saving throw (DC 8 + CON modifier + Proficiency Bonus). On a failed save, it takes 2d12 + CON modifier damage. On a successful save, it takes no damage.

name: Boon of Fate
description:
You gain the following benefits.

**Ability Score Increase.** Increase one ability score of your choice by 1, to a maximum of 30.

**Improve Fate.** When you or another creature within 60 feet of you succeeds on or fails a {rule:D20 Test}, you can roll 2d4 and apply the total rolled as a bonus or penalty to the d20 roll. Once you use this benefit, you can't use it again until you roll {rule:Initiative} or finish a Short Rest or Long Rest.

properties.text: Improve Fate: When you or a creature within 60 feet succeeds or fails a D20 Test, you can roll 2d4 and add or subtract the result from the d20 roll. Recharges on Initiative roll or Short/Long Rest.

name: Boon of Fortitude
description:
You gain the following benefits.

**Ability Score Increase.** Increase one ability score of your choice by 1, to a maximum of 30.

**Fortified Health.** Your Hit Point maximum increases by 40. In addition, whenever you regain Hit Points, you can regain additional Hit Points equal to your Constitution modifier. Once you've regained these additional Hit Points, you can't do so again until the start of your next turn.

properties.text: Fortified Health: Whenever you regain Hit Points, you can regain additional HP equal to your Constitution modifier. Once per turn.

name: Boon of Irresistible Offense
description:
You gain the following benefits.

**Ability Score Increase.** Increase your Strength or Dexterity by 1, to a maximum of 30.

**Overcome Defenses.** The Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing damage you deal always ignores {rule:Resistance}.

**Overwhelming Strike.** When you roll a 20 on the d20 for an attack roll, you can deal extra damage to the target equal to the ability score increased by this feat. The extra damage's type is the same as the attack's type.

properties.text: Overcome Defenses: Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing damage you deal always ignores Resistance.
Overwhelming Strike: When you roll a 20 on the d20 for an attack roll, deal extra damage equal to the increased ability score. Same damage type as the attack.

name: Boon of Recovery
description:
You gain the following benefits.

**Ability Score Increase.** Increase one ability score of your choice by 1, to a maximum of 30.

**Last Stand.** When you would be reduced to 0 Hit Points, you can drop to 1 Hit Point instead and regain a number of Hit Points equal to half your Hit Point maximum. Once you use this benefit, you can't use it again until you finish a Long Rest.

**Recover Vitality.** You have a pool of ten d10s. As a Bonus Action, you can expend dice from the pool, roll those dice, and regain a number of Hit Points equal to the roll's total. You regain all the expended dice when you finish a Long Rest.

properties.text: Last Stand: When reduced to 0 HP, you can drop to 1 HP instead and regain HP equal to half your HP maximum. Once per Long Rest.
Recover Vitality: As a Bonus Action, expend any number of the d10 pool dice, roll them, and regain that many HP. All dice return on a Long Rest.

name: Boon of Skill
description:
You gain the following benefits.

**Ability Score Increase.** Increase one ability score of your choice by 1, to a maximum of 30.

**All-Around Adept.** You gain proficiency in all skills.

**Expertise.** Choose one skill in which you lack {rule:Expertise}. You gain Expertise in that skill.

name: Boon of Speed
description:
You gain the following benefits.

**Ability Score Increase.** Increase one ability score of your choice by 1, to a maximum of 30.

**Escape Artist.** As a Bonus Action, you can take the {action:Disengage} action, which also ends the {condition:Grappled} condition on you.

**Quickness.** Your Speed increases by 30 feet.

properties.text: Escape Artist: As a Bonus Action, you can take the Disengage action, which also ends the Grappled condition on you.

name: Boon of Spell Recall
prerequisite: Level 19+, Spellcasting or Pact Magic feature
description:
You gain the following benefits.

**Ability Score Increase.** Increase your Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma by 1, to a maximum of 30.

**Free Casting.** Whenever you cast a spell with a level 1–4 spell slot, roll 1d4. If the number you roll is the same as the slot's level, the slot isn't expended.

properties.text: Free Casting: Whenever you cast a spell using a level 1–4 spell slot, roll 1d4. If the result equals the slot's level, the slot is not expended.

name: Boon of the Night Spirit
description:
You gain the following benefits.

**Ability Score Increase.** Increase one ability score of your choice by 1, to a maximum of 30.

**Merge with Shadows.** While within Dim Light or Darkness, you can give yourself the {condition:Invisible} condition as a Bonus Action. The condition ends on you immediately after you take an action, a Bonus Action, or a Reaction.

**Shadowy Form.** While within Dim Light or Darkness, you have {rule:Resistance|resistance} to all damage except Psychic and Radiant.

properties.text: Merge with Shadows: While in Dim Light or Darkness, you can become Invisible as a Bonus Action. The condition ends immediately after you take an action, Bonus Action, or Reaction.

properties.condition: while in Dim Light or Darkness
while in Dim Light or Darkness
while in Dim Light or Darkness
while in Dim Light or Darkness
while in Dim Light or Darkness
while in Dim Light or Darkness
while in Dim Light or Darkness
while in Dim Light or Darkness
while in Dim Light or Darkness
while in Dim Light or Darkness
while in Dim Light or Darkness

name: Boon of Truesight
description:
You gain the following benefits.

**Ability Score Increase.** Increase one ability score of your choice by 1, to a maximum of 30.

**Truesight.** You have {rule:Truesight|truesight} with a range of 60 feet.

name: Bountiful Luck
description: Your people have extraordinary luck, which you have learned to mystically lend to your companions when you see them falter. When an ally you can see within 30 feet of you rolls a 1 on the d20 for an attack roll, an ability check, or a saving throw, you can use your reaction to let the ally reroll the die. The ally must use the new roll. When you use this ability, you can't use your Lucky racial trait before the end of your next turn.

properties.text: When an ally within 30 feet rolls a 1 on a d20 for an attack roll, ability check, or saving throw, you can use your reaction to let them reroll. They must use the new roll. You can't use your Lucky trait before the end of your next turn after using this.

name: Charger
description:
You gain the following benefits.

**Improved Dash.** When you take the {action:Dash} action, your Speed increases by 10 feet for that action.

**Charge Attack.** If you move at least 10 feet in a straight line toward a target immediately before hitting it with a melee attack roll as part of the {action:Attack} action, choose one of the following effects: gain a 1d8 bonus to the attack's damage roll, or push the target up to 10 feet away if it is no more than one size larger than you. You can use this benefit only once on each of your turns.

properties.text: When you take the Dash action, your Speed increases by 10 feet for that action.

If you move at least 10 feet in a straight line toward a target before hitting it with a melee attack (part of the Attack action), you may deal an extra 1d8 damage or push the target up to 10 feet (if it's no more than one size larger). Once per turn.

name: Chef
description:
You gain the following benefits.

**Cook's Utensils.** You gain proficiency with Cook's Utensils if you don't already have it.

**Replenishing Meal.** As part of a {rule:Short Rest}, you can cook special food if you have ingredients and Cook's Utensils on hand. You can prepare enough food for a number of creatures equal to 4 plus your Proficiency Bonus. At the end of the Short Rest, any creature who eats the food and spends one or more Hit Dice to regain Hit Points regains an extra 1d8 Hit Points.

**Bolstering Treats.** With 1 hour of work or when you finish a {rule:Long Rest}, you can cook a number of treats equal to your Proficiency Bonus if you have ingredients and Cook's Utensils on hand. These special treats last 8 hours after being made. A creature can use a Bonus Action to eat one of those treats to gain a number of Temporary Hit Points equal to your Proficiency Bonus.

properties.text: During a Short Rest, cook food for up to 4 + Proficiency Bonus creatures; each who eats it and spends Hit Dice regains an extra 1d8 HP.
With 1 hour of work or after a Long Rest, create Proficiency Bonus treats (last 8 hrs). A creature can use a Bonus Action to eat one and gain Temporary HP equal to your Proficiency Bonus.

name: Crafter
description:
You gain the following benefits.

**Tool Proficiency.** You gain proficiency with three different Artisan's Tools of your choice from the following: Carpenter's Tools, Leatherworker's Tools, Mason's Tools, Potter's Tools, Smith's Tools, Tinker's Tools, Weaver's Tools, or Woodcarver's Tools.

**Discount.** Whenever you buy a nonmagical item, you receive a 20 percent discount on it.

**Fast Crafting.** When you finish a {rule:Long Rest}, you can craft one piece of gear from the Fast Crafting table, provided you have the Artisan's Tools associated with that item and have proficiency with those tools. The item lasts until you finish another Long Rest, at which point the item falls apart.

properties.text: You receive a 20% discount when purchasing nonmagical items.
After a Long Rest, you can craft one temporary item using your proficient Artisan's Tools. The item lasts until your next Long Rest.

name: Crossbow Expert
description:
Increase your Dexterity score by 1, to a maximum of 20. You gain the following benefits.

**Ignore Loading.** You ignore the Loading property of the Hand Crossbow, Heavy Crossbow, and Light Crossbow. If you're holding one of them, you can load a piece of ammunition into it even if you lack a free hand.

**Firing in Melee.** Being within 5 feet of an enemy doesn't impose {rule:Disadvantage} on your attack rolls with crossbows.

**Dual Wielding.** When you make the extra attack of the Light property, you can add your ability modifier to the damage of the extra attack if that attack is with a crossbow that has the Light property and you aren't already adding that modifier to the damage.

properties.text: Ignore the Loading property of crossbows. Can load even without a free hand.
Being within 5 feet of an enemy doesn't impose disadvantage on crossbow attack rolls.
When making the extra Light-property attack with a crossbow that has the Light property, you can add your ability modifier to the damage if you aren't already doing so.

name: Crusher
description:
You gain the following benefits.

**Push.** Once per turn, when you hit a creature with an attack that deals Bludgeoning damage, you can move it 5 feet to an unoccupied space if the target is no more than one size larger than you.

**Enhanced Critical.** When you score a {rule:Critical Hit} that deals Bludgeoning damage to a creature, attack rolls against that creature have {rule:Advantage} until the start of your next turn.

properties.text: Once per turn, when you deal Bludgeoning damage, you can push the target up to 5 feet to an unoccupied space (target must be no more than one size larger than you).
When you score a Critical Hit with Bludgeoning damage, attack rolls against that creature have advantage until the start of your next turn.

name: Defense
description: While you're wearing Light, Medium, or Heavy armor, you gain a +1 bonus to Armor Class.

name: Defensive Duelist
description:
Increase your Dexterity score by 1, to a maximum of 20. You gain the following benefits.

**Parry.** If you're holding a Finesse weapon and another creature hits you with a melee attack, you can take a Reaction to add your Proficiency Bonus to your Armor Class, potentially causing the attack to miss you. You gain this bonus to your AC against melee attacks until the start of your next turn.

properties.text: When holding a Finesse weapon and hit by a melee attack, you can use your Reaction to add your Proficiency Bonus to AC (applies against melee attacks until start of your next turn).

name: Dragon Fear
description: When angered, you radiate menace. Instead of exhaling destructive energy, you can expend a use of your Breath Weapon to roar, forcing each creature of your choice within 30 feet of you to make a Wisdom saving throw (DC 8 + your Proficiency Bonus + your Charisma modifier). A target automatically succeeds on the save if it can't hear or see you. On a failed save, a target becomes {condition:Frightened} of you for 1 minute. If the frightened target takes any damage, it can repeat the saving throw, ending the effect on itself on a success.

properties.text: You can expend a use of your Breath Weapon to roar instead of exhaling: targets of your choice within 30 ft must make a Wisdom save (DC 8 + Prof + Cha mod) or be Frightened of you for 1 minute. They can repeat the save when they take damage.

name: Dragon Hide
description: You manifest scales and claws reminiscent of your draconic ancestors. While you aren't wearing armor, you can calculate your AC as 13 + your Dexterity modifier. You can use a shield and still gain this benefit. You grow retractable claws from the tips of your fingers. Extending or retracting the claws requires no action. The claws are natural weapons, which you can use to make unarmed strikes. If you hit with them, you deal slashing damage equal to 1d4 + your Strength modifier, instead of the normal bludgeoning damage for an unarmed strike.

properties.text: While unarmored, your AC equals 13 + Dexterity modifier. You can still use a shield.
You have retractable claws usable as natural weapons for unarmed strikes dealing 1d4 + Strength modifier slashing damage.

name: Drow High Magic
description: You learn more of the magic typical of dark elves. You learn the {spell:Detect Magic} spell and can cast it at will, without expending a spell slot. You also learn {spell:Levitate} and {spell:Dispel Magic}, each of which you can cast once without expending a spell slot. You regain the ability to cast those two spells in this way when you finish a {rule:Long Rest}. Charisma is your spellcasting ability for all three spells.

name: Druidic Warrior
description: You learn two Druid cantrips of your choice. {spell:Guidance} and {spell:Starry Wisp} are recommended. The chosen cantrips count as Ranger spells for you, and Wisdom is your spellcasting ability for them. Whenever you gain a Ranger level, you can replace one of these cantrips with another Druid cantrip.

options.label: Any Druid cantrip
options.description: Choose any cantrip from the Druid spell list. Wisdom is your spellcasting ability for it.

properties.text: The two chosen Druid cantrips use Wisdom as the spellcasting ability and count as Ranger spells. You can replace one at each Ranger level.

name: Dual Wielder
description:
You gain the following benefits.

**Enhanced Dual Wielding.** When you take the {action:Attack} action on your turn and attack with a weapon that has the Light property, you can make one extra attack as a Bonus Action later on the same turn with a different weapon, which must be a Melee weapon that lacks the Two-Handed property. You don't add your ability modifier to the extra attack's damage unless that modifier is negative.

**Quick Draw.** You can draw or stow two weapons that lack the Two-Handed property when you would normally be able to draw or stow only one.

properties.text: When you use the Attack action with a Light weapon, you can make one extra Bonus Action attack with a different melee weapon that lacks the Two-Handed property. No ability modifier to damage on the extra attack (unless negative).
You can draw or stow two non-Two-Handed weapons at once.

name: Dueling
description: When you're holding a Melee weapon in one hand and no other weapons, you gain a +2 bonus to damage rolls with that weapon.

modifiers.condition: while holding a melee weapon in one hand and no other weapons

name: Durable
description:
You gain the following benefits.

**Defy Death.** You have {rule:Advantage} on {rule:Death Saving Throw|Death Saving Throws}.

**Speedy Recovery.** As a Bonus Action, you can expend one of your Hit Point Dice, roll the die, and regain a number of Hit Points equal to the roll.

properties.text: As a Bonus Action, you can expend one Hit Die, roll it, and regain that many HP.

name: Dwarven Fortitude
description: You have the blood of dwarf heroes flowing through your veins. Whenever you take the {action:Dodge} action in combat, you can spend one Hit Die to heal yourself. Roll the die, add your Constitution modifier, and regain a number of hit points equal to the total (minimum of 1).

properties.text: When you take the Dodge action in combat, you can spend one Hit Die to heal: roll the die + Constitution modifier, regain that many HP (minimum 1).

name: Eldritch Adept
description: Studying occult lore, you learn one {feat:Eldritch Invocation|Eldritch Invocation} option of your choice from the {class:Warlock} class. Your spellcasting ability for the invocation is Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma (choose when you select this feat). If the invocation has a prerequisite of any kind, you can choose that invocation only if you're a Warlock who meets the prerequisite. Whenever you gain a level, you can replace the invocation with another one from the Warlock class.

properties.text: Learn one Eldritch Invocation from the Warlock class. Spellcasting ability is Int, Wis, or Cha (your choice). Can only choose an invocation with prerequisites if you're a Warlock who meets them. Can swap at each level.

name: Elemental Adept
prerequisite: Level 4+, Spellcasting or Pact Magic feature
description:
You gain the following benefits.

**Energy Mastery.** Choose one of the following damage types: Acid, Cold, Fire, Lightning, or Thunder. Spells you cast ignore {rule:Resistance} to damage of the chosen type. In addition, when you roll damage for a spell you cast that deals damage of that type, you can treat any 1 on a damage die as a 2.

**Repeatable.** You can take this feat more than once, but you must choose a different damage type each time for Energy Mastery.

properties.text: Your spells ignore resistance to Acid damage. Treat 1s as 2s on Acid damage dice.
Your spells ignore resistance to Cold damage. Treat 1s as 2s on Cold damage dice.
Your spells ignore resistance to Fire damage. Treat 1s as 2s on Fire damage dice.
Your spells ignore resistance to Lightning damage. Treat 1s as 2s on Lightning damage dice.
Your spells ignore resistance to Thunder damage. Treat 1s as 2s on Thunder damage dice.

name: Elven Accuracy
description: The accuracy of elves is legendary, especially that of elf archers and spellcasters. Whenever you have {rule:Advantage} on an attack roll using Dexterity, Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma, you can reroll one of the dice once.

properties.text: When you have advantage on an attack roll using Dexterity, Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma, you can reroll one of the dice once.

name: Fade Away
description: Your people are clever, with a knack for illusion magic. You have learned a magical trick for fading away when you suffer harm. Immediately after you take damage, you can use a reaction to magically become {condition:Invisible} until the end of your next turn or until you attack, deal damage, or force someone to make a saving throw. Once you use this ability, you can't do so again until you finish a {rule:Short Rest} or {rule:Long Rest}.

properties.text: When you take damage, you can use your Reaction to become Invisible until the end of your next turn or until you attack, deal damage, or force a saving throw.

name: Fey Teleportation
description: Your study of high elven lore has unlocked fey power. You learn to speak, read, and write Sylvan. You learn the {spell:Misty Step} spell and can cast it once without expending a spell slot. You regain the ability to cast it in this way when you finish a {rule:Short Rest} or {rule:Long Rest}. Intelligence is your spellcasting ability for this spell.

properties.text: Misty Step can be cast once without a spell slot (recharges on short or long rest). Can also cast using spell slots.

name: Fey-Touched
description:
Your exposure to the Feywild's magic grants you the following benefits.

**Fey Magic.** Choose one level 1 spell from the Divination or Enchantment school of magic. You always have that spell and the {spell:Misty Step} spell prepared. You can cast each of these spells without expending a spell slot. Once you cast either spell in this way, you can't cast that spell in this way again until you finish a {rule:Long Rest}. You can also cast these spells using spell slots you have of the appropriate level. The spells' spellcasting ability is the ability increased by this feat.

choices.label: Fey Magic Spell
choices.description: Choose one level 1 spell from the Divination or Enchantment school of magic. You always have it prepared. It can be cast once per long rest without a spell slot, and also using spell slots of the appropriate level. The spellcasting ability is the ability increased by this feat.

options.label: Any level 1 Divination or Enchantment spell
options.description: Select one spell of level 1 from the Divination (D) or Enchantment (E) school.

properties.text: You always have Misty Step and one chosen level 1 Divination or Enchantment spell prepared. Each can be cast once per long rest without a spell slot. Both spells can also be cast using spell slots of the appropriate level. Spellcasting ability is the ability increased by this feat.

name: Fighting Initiate
description: Your martial training has helped you develop a particular style of fighting. You learn one Fighting Style option of your choice from the {class:Fighter} class. If you already have a style, the one you choose must be different. Whenever you reach a level that grants the Ability Score Improvement feature, you can replace this feat's fighting style with another one from the Fighter class that you don't have.

properties.text: Learn one Fighter Fighting Style of your choice. Must be different from any you already have. Can swap at any level that grants an ASI.

name: Flames of Phlegethos
description: You learn to call on hellfire to serve your commands. When you roll fire damage for a spell you cast, you can reroll any roll of 1 on the fire damage dice, but you must use the new roll, even if it is another 1. Whenever you cast a spell that deals fire damage, you can cause flames to wreathe you until the end of your next turn. The flames don't harm you or your possessions, and they shed bright light out to 30 feet and dim light for an additional 30 feet. While the flames are present, any creature within 5 feet of you that hits you with a melee attack takes 1d4 fire damage.

properties.text: When rolling fire damage for a spell, you can reroll any 1 on the damage dice (must use new roll).

When you cast a fire-damage spell, you can cause flames to wreathe you until end of your next turn: bright light 30 ft, dim 30 ft. Creatures within 5 ft that hit you with a melee attack take 1d4 fire damage.

name: Grappler
description:
You gain the following benefits.

**Punch and Grab.** When you hit a creature with an Unarmed Strike as part of the {action:Attack} action on your turn, you can use both the Damage and the Grapple option. You can use this benefit only once per turn.

**Attack Advantage.** You have {rule:Advantage} on attack rolls against a creature {condition:Grappled} by you.

**Fast Wrestler.** You don't have to spend extra movement to move a creature {condition:Grappled} by you if the creature is your size or smaller.

properties.condition: against a creature you have Grappled

properties.text: When hitting with an Unarmed Strike as part of the Attack action, you can use both the Damage and Grapple options. Once per turn.
No extra movement cost to move a creature you are Grappling if it is your size or smaller.

name: Great Weapon Fighting
description: When you roll damage for an attack you make with a Melee weapon that you are holding with two hands, you can treat any 1 or 2 on a damage die as a 3. The weapon must have the Two-Handed or Versatile property to gain this benefit.

properties.text: When rolling damage with a Two-Handed or Versatile melee weapon held in two hands, treat any damage die result of 1 or 2 as a 3.

name: Great Weapon Master
description:
You gain the following benefits.

**Heavy Weapon Mastery.** When you hit a creature with a weapon that has the Heavy property as part of the {action:Attack} action on your turn, you can cause the weapon to deal extra damage to the target. The extra damage equals your Proficiency Bonus.

**Hew.** Immediately after you score a {rule:Critical Hit} with a Melee weapon or reduce a creature to 0 Hit Points with one, you can make one attack with the same weapon as a Bonus Action.

properties.text: When you hit with a Heavy weapon as part of the Attack action, deal extra damage equal to your Proficiency Bonus.
After scoring a Critical Hit with a melee weapon or reducing a creature to 0 HP, you can make one extra attack with the same weapon as a Bonus Action.

name: Gunner
description: You have a quick hand and keen eye when employing firearms. You gain proficiency with firearms. You ignore the Loading property of firearms. Being within 5 feet of a hostile creature doesn't impose {rule:Disadvantage} on your ranged attack rolls.

properties.text: Ignore the Loading property of firearms.
Being within 5 feet of a hostile creature doesn't impose disadvantage on your ranged attack rolls.

name: Healer
description:
You gain the following benefits.

**Battle Medic.** If you have a Healer's Kit, you can expend one use of it and tend to a creature within 5 feet of yourself as a {action:Utilize} action. That creature can expend one of its Hit Point Dice, and you then roll that die. The creature regains a number of Hit Points equal to the roll plus your Proficiency Bonus.

**Healing Rerolls.** Whenever you roll a die to determine the number of Hit Points you restore with a spell or with this feat's Battle Medic benefit, you can reroll the die if it rolls a 1, and you must use the new roll.

properties.text: Requires a Healer's Kit. As a Utilize action, expend one kit use: a creature within 5 feet spends a Hit Die and regains that roll + your Proficiency Bonus in HP.
When you roll a 1 on any die to determine HP restored (via spell or Battle Medic), you may reroll and must use the new result.

name: Heavily Armored
description:
You gain the following benefits.

**Armor Training.** You gain training with Heavy armor.

name: Heavy Armor Master
description:
You gain the following benefits.

**Damage Reduction.** When you're hit by an attack while you're wearing Heavy armor, any Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing damage dealt to you by that attack is reduced by an amount equal to your Proficiency Bonus.

properties.text: While wearing Heavy armor, Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing damage from attacks against you is reduced by your Proficiency Bonus.

name: Infernal Constitution
description: Fiendish blood runs strong in you, unlocking a resilience akin to that possessed by some fiends. You have resistance to cold and poison damage. You have {rule:Advantage} on saving throws against being {condition:Poisoned}.

name: Inspiring Leader
description:
You gain the following benefits.

**Bolstering Performance.** When you finish a {rule:Short Rest} or {rule:Long Rest}, you can give an inspiring performance: a speech, song, or dance. When you do so, choose up to six allies (which can include yourself) within 30 feet of yourself who witness the performance. The chosen creatures each gain Temporary Hit Points equal to your character level plus the modifier of the ability you increased with this feat.

properties.text: After a Short or Long Rest, give an inspiring performance to up to 6 allies within 30 ft. Each gains Temporary HP equal to your character level + the modifier of the ability increased by this feat.

name: Interception
description: When a creature you can see hits another creature within 5 feet of you with an attack roll, you can take a {rule:Reaction} to reduce the damage dealt to the target by 1d10 plus your Proficiency Bonus. You must be holding a Shield or a Simple or Martial weapon to use this Reaction.

properties.text: Reaction: When a visible creature hits another creature within 5 feet of you, reduce the damage by 1d10 + Proficiency Bonus. Requires holding a shield or Simple/Martial weapon.

name: Keen Mind
description:
You gain the following benefits.

**Lore Knowledge.** Choose one of the following skills: Arcana, History, Investigation, Nature, or Religion. If you lack proficiency in the chosen skill, you gain proficiency in it, and if you already have proficiency in it, you gain {rule:Expertise} in it.

**Quick Study.** You can take the {action:Study} action as a Bonus Action.

properties.text: Quick Study: you can take the Study action as a Bonus Action.

name: Lightly Armored
description:
You gain the following benefits.

**Armor Training.** You gain training with Light armor and Shields.

name: Lucky
description:
You gain the following benefits.

**Luck Points.** You have a number of Luck Points equal to your Proficiency Bonus and can spend the points on the benefits below. You regain your expended Luck Points when you finish a {rule:Long Rest}.

**Advantage.** When you roll a d20 for a {rule:D20 Test}, you can spend 1 Luck Point to give yourself {rule:Advantage} on the roll.

**Disadvantage.** When a creature rolls a d20 for an attack roll against you, you can spend 1 Luck Point to impose {rule:Disadvantage} on that roll.

properties.text: Spend 1 Luck Point to gain Advantage on any D20 Test you make.
Spend 1 Luck Point to impose Disadvantage on an attack roll made against you.

name: Mage Slayer
description:
You gain the following benefits.

**Concentration Breaker.** When you damage a creature that is {status:Concentration|Concentrating}, it has {rule:Disadvantage} on the saving throw it makes to maintain {status:Concentration}.

**Guarded Mind.** If you fail an Intelligence, a Wisdom, or a Charisma saving throw, you can cause yourself to succeed instead. Once you use this benefit, you can't use it again until you finish a {rule:Short Rest} or {rule:Long Rest}.

properties.text: When you damage a concentrating creature, it has disadvantage on the Constitution save to maintain concentration.
If you fail an Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma saving throw, you can expend Guarded Mind to succeed instead (recharges on short or long rest).

name: Magic Initiate
description:
You gain the following benefits.

**Two Cantrips.** You learn two cantrips of your choice from the Cleric, Druid, or Wizard spell list. Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma is your spellcasting ability for this feat's spells (choose when you select this feat).

**Level 1 Spell.** Choose a level 1 spell from the same list you selected for this feat's cantrips. You always have that spell prepared. You can cast it once without a spell slot, and you regain the ability to cast it in that way when you finish a {rule:Long Rest}. You can also cast the spell using any spell slots you have.

**Spell Change.** Whenever you gain a new level, you can replace one of the spells you chose for this feat with a different spell of the same level from the chosen spell list.

**Repeatable.** You can take this feat more than once, but you must choose a different spell list each time.

properties.text: Learn 2 cantrips and 1 level 1 spell from the chosen list. The level 1 spell is always prepared and can be cast once per Long Rest without a slot.

name: Martial Weapon Training
description:
You gain the following benefits.

**Weapon Proficiency.** You gain proficiency with Martial weapons.

name: Medium Armor Master
description:
You gain the following benefits.

**Dexterous Wearer.** While you're wearing Medium armor, you can add 3, rather than 2, to your AC if you have a Dexterity score of 16 or higher.

properties.text: While wearing Medium armor, you can add up to 3 (instead of 2) to your AC from Dexterity if your Dexterity score is 16 or higher.

name: Metamagic Adept
description: You've learned how to exert your will on your spells to alter how they function. You learn two Metamagic options of your choice from the {class:Sorcerer} class. You can use only one Metamagic option on a spell when you cast it, unless the option says otherwise. Whenever you reach a level that grants the Ability Score Improvement feature, you can replace one of these Metamagic options with another one from the Sorcerer class. You gain 2 sorcery points to spend on Metamagic (these points are added to any sorcery points you have from another source but can be used only on Metamagic). You regain all spent sorcery points when you finish a {rule:Long Rest}.

properties.text: Learn two Metamagic options from the Sorcerer class. The 2 sorcery points granted can only be used for Metamagic. Can swap one option at each ASI level.

choices.label: Metamagic Options
choices.description: Choose 2 Metamagic options from the Sorcerer class. You can use only one Metamagic option on a spell when you cast it, unless the option says otherwise. You can replace one chosen option whenever you reach a level that grants the Ability Score Improvement feature.

options.label: Any Sorcerer Metamagic option
options.description: Select from the full list of Sorcerer Metamagic options (see Optional Features).

name: Moderately Armored
description:
You gain the following benefits.

**Armor Training.** You gain training with Medium armor.

name: Mounted Combatant
description:
You gain the following benefits.

**Mounted Strike.** While mounted, you have {rule:Advantage} on attack rolls against any unmounted creature within 5 feet of your mount that is at least one size smaller than the mount.

**Leap Aside.** If your mount is subjected to an effect that allows it to make a Dexterity saving throw to take only half damage, it instead takes no damage if it succeeds on the saving throw and only half damage if it fails. For your mount to gain this benefit, you must be riding it, and neither of you can have the {condition:Incapacitated} condition.

**Veer.** While mounted, you can force an attack that hits your mount to hit you instead if you don't have the {condition:Incapacitated} condition.

properties.condition: while mounted, against unmounted creatures within 5 ft of mount that are at least one size smaller than mount

properties.text: While riding your mount, if your mount is subjected to a Dexterity save for half damage, it takes no damage on a success and half on a failure (requires neither of you to be Incapacitated).
While mounted and not Incapacitated, you can redirect an attack that hits your mount to hit you instead.

name: Musician
description:
You gain the following benefits.

**Instrument Training.** You gain proficiency with three Musical Instruments of your choice.

**Encouraging Song.** As you finish a {rule:Short Rest} or {rule:Long Rest}, you can play a song on a Musical Instrument with which you have proficiency and give {rule:Heroic Inspiration} to allies who hear the song. The number of allies you can affect in this way equals your Proficiency Bonus.

properties.text: After a Short Rest or Long Rest, you can grant Heroic Inspiration to a number of allies equal to your Proficiency Bonus who heard you play.

name: Observant
description:
You gain the following benefits.

**Keen Observer.** Choose one of the following skills: {rule:Insight}, {rule:Investigation}, or Perception. If you lack proficiency with the chosen skill, you gain proficiency in it, and if you already have proficiency in it, you gain {rule:Expertise} in it.

**Quick Search.** You can take the {action:Search} action as a Bonus Action.

properties.text: Can take the Search action as a Bonus Action.

name: Orcish Fury
description:
Your fury burns tirelessly. You gain the following benefits:

When you hit with an attack using a simple or martial weapon, you can roll one of the weapon's damage dice an additional time and add it as extra damage of the weapon's damage type. Once you use this ability, you can't use it again until you finish a Short or Long Rest.

Immediately after you use your Relentless Endurance trait, you can use your reaction to make one weapon attack.

properties.text: Once per short rest, when you hit with a weapon attack, you can roll one of the weapon's damage dice an additional time and add it as extra damage.
Immediately after you use your Relentless Endurance trait, you can use your reaction to make one weapon attack.

name: Piercer
description:
You gain the following benefits.

**Puncture.** Once per turn, when you hit a creature with an attack that deals Piercing damage, you can reroll one of the attack's damage dice, and you must use the new roll.

**Enhanced Critical.** When you score a {rule:Critical Hit} that deals Piercing damage to a creature, you can roll one additional damage die when determining the extra Piercing damage the target takes.

properties.text: Once per turn, when you deal Piercing damage, you can reroll one damage die and must use the new result.
On a Critical Hit that deals Piercing damage, roll one additional damage die for the extra damage.

name: Poisoner
description:
You gain the following benefits.

**Potent Poison.** When you make a damage roll that deals Poison damage, it ignores {rule:Resistance} to Poison damage.

**Brew Poison.** You gain proficiency with the Poisoner's Kit. With 1 hour of work using such a kit and expending 50 GP worth of materials, you can create a number of poison doses equal to your Proficiency Bonus. As a Bonus Action, you can apply a poison dose to a weapon or piece of ammunition. Once applied, the poison retains its potency for 1 minute or until you deal damage with the poisoned item, whichever is shorter. When a creature takes damage from the poisoned item, that creature must succeed on a Constitution saving throw (DC 8 plus the modifier of the ability increased by this feat and your Proficiency Bonus) or take 2d8 Poison damage and have the {condition:Poisoned} condition until the end of your next turn.

properties.text: Your Poison damage rolls ignore resistance to Poison damage.

With 1 hour of work and 50 GP of materials using a Poisoner's Kit, you create poison doses equal to your Proficiency Bonus. Apply as a Bonus Action; target must make a Constitution save (DC 8 + ability mod + prof) or take 2d8 Poison damage and gain the Poisoned condition until end of your next turn.

name: Polearm Master
description:
You gain the following benefits.

**Pole Strike.** Immediately after you take the {action:Attack} action and attack with a Quarterstaff, a Spear, or a weapon that has the Heavy and Reach properties, you can use a Bonus Action to make a melee attack with the opposite end of the weapon. The weapon deals Bludgeoning damage, and the weapon's damage die for this attack is a d4.

**Reactive Strike.** While you're holding a Quarterstaff, a Spear, or a weapon that has the Heavy and Reach properties, you can take a Reaction to make one melee attack against a creature that enters the reach you have with that weapon.

properties.text: After taking the Attack action with a Quarterstaff, Spear, or Heavy+Reach weapon, you can use a Bonus Action to make a d4 Bludgeoning melee attack with the weapon's opposite end.
While holding a Quarterstaff, Spear, or Heavy+Reach weapon, you can use your Reaction to make a melee attack against a creature that enters your reach.

name: Prodigy
description:
You have a knack for learning new things. You gain the following benefits:

You gain one skill proficiency of your choice, one tool proficiency of your choice, and fluency in one language of your choice.

Choose one skill in which you have proficiency. You gain {rule:Expertise} with that skill, which means your proficiency bonus is doubled for any ability check you make with it. The skill you choose must be one that isn't already benefiting from a feature, such as Expertise, that doubles your proficiency bonus.

name: Protection
description: When a creature you can see attacks a target other than you that is within 5 feet of you, you can take a {rule:Reaction} to interpose your Shield if you're holding one. You impose {rule:Disadvantage} on the triggering attack roll and all other attack rolls against the target until the start of your next turn if you remain within 5 feet of the target.

properties.text: Reaction (requires Shield): When a visible creature attacks a target within 5 feet of you (not you), impose Disadvantage on that attack and all attacks against the same target until the start of your next turn, while you remain within 5 feet.

name: Resilient
description:
You gain the following benefits.

**Saving Throw Proficiency.** Choose one ability in which you lack saving throw proficiency. You gain saving throw proficiency with the chosen ability, and increase that ability score by 1, to a maximum of 20.

name: Ritual Caster
description:
You gain the following benefits.

**Ritual Spells.** Choose a number of level 1 spells equal to your Proficiency Bonus that have the Ritual tag. You always have those spells prepared, and you can cast them with any spell slots you have. The spells' spellcasting ability is the ability increased by this feat. Whenever your Proficiency Bonus increases thereafter, you can add an additional level 1 Ritual spell to the spells always prepared with this feature.

**Quick Ritual.** With this benefit, you can cast a {rule:Ritual} spell that you have prepared using its regular casting time rather than the extended time for a Ritual. Doing so doesn't require a spell slot. Once you cast the spell in this way, you can't use this benefit again until you finish a Long Rest.

properties.text: You always have a number of level 1 Ritual spells prepared equal to your Proficiency Bonus (choose when you gain this feat and whenever your Proficiency Bonus increases). You can cast a prepared Ritual spell at its normal casting time without a spell slot once per long rest (Quick Ritual).

name: Savage Attacker
description: You've trained to deal particularly damaging strikes. Once per turn when you hit a target with a weapon, you can roll the weapon's damage dice twice and use either roll against the target.

properties.text: Once per turn when you hit with a weapon attack, you can roll the weapon's damage dice twice and use either result.

name: Second Chance
description: Fortune favors you when someone tries to strike you. When a creature you can see hits you with an attack roll, you can use your reaction to force that creature to reroll. Once you use this ability, you can't use it again until you roll initiative at the start of combat or until you finish a Short or Long Rest.

properties.text: When a creature you can see hits you with an attack roll, you can use your Reaction to force that creature to reroll. Recharges when you roll initiative or finish a Short or Long Rest.

name: Sentinel
description:
You gain the following benefits.

**Guardian.** Immediately after a creature within 5 feet of you takes the {action:Disengage} action or hits a target other than you with an attack, you can make an {action:Opportunity Attack} against that creature.

**Halt.** When you hit a creature with an {action:Opportunity Attack}, the creature's Speed becomes 0 for the rest of the current turn.

properties.text: Immediately after a creature within 5 feet of you takes the Disengage action or hits a target other than you with an attack, you can make an Opportunity Attack against that creature.
When you hit a creature with an Opportunity Attack, the creature's Speed becomes 0 for the rest of the current turn.

name: Shadow-Touched
description:
Your exposure to the Shadowfell's magic grants you the following benefits.

**Shadow Magic.** Choose one level 1 spell from the Illusion or Necromancy school of magic. You always have that spell and the {spell:Invisibility} spell prepared. You can cast each of these spells without expending a spell slot. Once you cast either spell in this way, you can't cast that spell in this way again until you finish a Long Rest. You can also cast these spells using spell slots you have of the appropriate level. The spells' spellcasting ability is the ability increased by this feat.

choices.label: Shadow Magic Spell
choices.description: Choose one level 1 spell from the Illusion or Necromancy school of magic. You always have it prepared. It can be cast once per long rest without a spell slot, and also using spell slots of the appropriate level. The spellcasting ability is the ability increased by this feat.

options.label: Any level 1 Illusion or Necromancy spell
options.description: Select one spell of level 1 from the Illusion (I) or Necromancy (N) school.

properties.text: You always have Invisibility and one chosen level 1 Illusion or Necromancy spell prepared. Each can be cast once per long rest without a spell slot. Both spells can also be cast using spell slots of the appropriate level. Spellcasting ability is the ability increased by this feat.

name: Sharpshooter
description:
Increase your Dexterity score by 1, to a maximum of 20. You gain the following benefits.

**Bypass Cover.** Your ranged attacks with weapons ignore Half Cover and Three-Quarters Cover.

**Firing in Melee.** Being within 5 feet of an enemy doesn't impose {rule:Disadvantage} on your attack rolls with Ranged weapons.

**Long Shots.** Attacking at long range doesn't impose {rule:Disadvantage} on your attack rolls with Ranged weapons.

properties.text: Your ranged weapon attacks ignore Half Cover and Three-Quarters Cover.
Being within 5 feet of an enemy doesn't impose Disadvantage on your ranged weapon attack rolls.
Attacking at long range doesn't impose Disadvantage on your ranged weapon attack rolls.

name: Shield Master
description:
Increase your Strength score by 1, to a maximum of 20. You gain the following benefits.

**Shield Bash.** If you attack a creature within 5 feet of you as part of the {action:Attack} action and hit with a Melee weapon, you can immediately bash the target with your Shield if it's equipped, forcing the target to make a Strength saving throw (DC 8 plus your Strength modifier and Proficiency Bonus). On a failed save, you either push the target 5 feet from you or cause it to have the {condition:Prone} condition (your choice). You can use this benefit only once on each of your turns.

**Interpose Shield.** If you're subjected to an effect that allows you to make a Dexterity saving throw to take only half damage, you can take a Reaction to take no damage if you succeed on the saving throw and are holding a Shield.

properties.text: Once per turn, when you hit a creature within 5 feet with a melee weapon as part of the Attack action, you can Shield Bash: the target makes a Strength save (DC 8 + STR mod + prof) or is pushed 5 feet or knocked Prone (your choice).
When subjected to a Dexterity save for half damage, you can use your Reaction to take no damage on a success (requires holding a Shield).

name: Skill Expert
description:
You gain the following benefits.

**Skill Proficiency.** You gain proficiency in one skill of your choice.

**Expertise.** Choose one skill in which you have proficiency but lack {rule:Expertise}. You gain Expertise with that skill.

name: Skilled
description:
You gain proficiency in any combination of three skills or tools of your choice.

**Repeatable.** You can take this feat more than once.

name: Skulker
description:
Increase your Dexterity score by 1, to a maximum of 20. You gain the following benefits.

**Blindsight.** You have {rule:Blindsight} with a range of 10 feet.

**Fog of War.** You exploit the distractions of battle, gaining {rule:Advantage} on any Dexterity (Stealth) check you make as part of the {action:Hide} action during combat.

**Sniper.** If you make an attack roll while hidden and the roll misses, making the attack roll doesn't reveal your location.

properties.condition: when taking the Hide action during combat

properties.text: If you make an attack roll while hidden and the roll misses, making the attack roll doesn't reveal your location.

name: Slasher
description:
You gain the following benefits.

**Hamstring.** Once per turn when you hit a creature with an attack that deals Slashing damage, you can reduce the Speed of that creature by 10 feet until the start of your next turn.

**Enhanced Critical.** When you score a {rule:Critical Hit} that deals Slashing damage to a creature, it has {rule:Disadvantage} on attack rolls until the start of your next turn.

properties.text: Once per turn, when you deal Slashing damage, you can reduce the target's Speed by 10 feet until the start of your next turn.
On a Critical Hit that deals Slashing damage, the target has Disadvantage on attack rolls until the start of your next turn.

name: Speedy
description:
You gain the following benefits.

**Speed Increase.** Your Speed increases by 10 feet.

**Dash over Difficult Terrain.** When you take the {action:Dash} action on your turn, Difficult Terrain doesn't cost you extra movement for the rest of that turn.

**Agile Movement.** Opportunity Attacks have {rule:Disadvantage} against you.

properties.text: When you take the Dash action, Difficult Terrain doesn't cost you extra movement for the rest of that turn.
Opportunity Attacks have Disadvantage against you.

name: Spell Sniper
prerequisite: Level 4+, Spellcasting or Pact Magic feature
description:
You gain the following benefits.

**Bypass Cover.** Your attack rolls for spells ignore Half Cover and Three-Quarters Cover.

**Casting in Melee.** Being within 5 feet of an enemy doesn't impose {rule:Disadvantage} on your attack rolls with spells.

**Increased Range.** When you cast a spell that has a range of at least 10 feet and requires you to make an attack roll, you can increase the spell's range by 60 feet.

properties.text: Your spell attack rolls ignore Half Cover and Three-Quarters Cover.
Being within 5 feet of an enemy doesn't impose Disadvantage on your spell attack rolls.
When you cast a spell with a range of at least 10 feet that requires an attack roll, you can increase its range by 60 feet.

name: Squat Nimbleness
description:
You are uncommonly nimble for your species. You gain the following benefits:

Your walking speed increases by 5 feet.

You gain proficiency in the Acrobatics or Athletics skill (your choice).

You have {rule:Advantage} on any Strength (Athletics) or Dexterity (Acrobatics) check you make to escape from being {condition:Grappled}.

properties.condition: when attempting to escape a Grapple
when attempting to escape a Grapple

name: Tavern Brawler
description:
You gain the following benefits.

**Enhanced Unarmed Strike.** When you hit with your Unarmed Strike and deal damage, you can deal Bludgeoning damage equal to 1d4 plus your Strength modifier instead of the normal damage of an Unarmed Strike.

**Damage Rerolls.** Whenever you roll a damage die for your Unarmed Strike, you can reroll the die if it rolls a 1, and you must use the new roll.

**Improvised Weaponry.** You have proficiency with improvised weapons.

**Push.** When you hit a creature with an Unarmed Strike as part of the {action:Attack} action on your turn, you can deal damage to the target and also push it 5 feet away from you. You can use this benefit only once per turn.

properties.text: Unarmed Strikes can deal 1d4 + Strength modifier Bludgeoning damage instead of normal damage.
Reroll any Unarmed Strike damage die that shows 1; you must use the new result.
Once per turn when you hit with an Unarmed Strike as part of the Attack action, you can push the target 5 feet away.

name: Telekinetic
description:
You gain the following benefits.

**Minor Telekinesis.** You learn the {spell:Mage Hand} spell. You can cast it without Verbal or Somatic components, you can make the spectral hand invisible, and its range and the distance it can be away from you both increase by 30 feet when you cast it. The spell's spellcasting ability is the ability increased by this feat.

**Telekinetic Shove.** As a Bonus Action, you can telekinetically shove one creature you can see within 30 feet of yourself. When you do so, the target must succeed on a Strength saving throw (DC 8 plus the ability modifier of the score increased by this feat and your Proficiency Bonus) or be moved 5 feet toward or away from you.

properties.text: Your Mage Hand can be cast without Verbal or Somatic components, the hand can be made invisible, and its range and maximum distance from you both increase by 30 feet.
As a Bonus Action, telekinetically shove one creature within 30 feet: target makes a Strength save (DC 8 + ability mod + prof) or moves 5 feet toward or away from you.

name: Telepathic
description:
You gain the following benefits.

**Telepathic Utterance.** You can speak telepathically to any creature you can see within 60 feet of yourself. Your telepathic utterances are in a language you know, and the creature understands you only if it knows that language. Your communication doesn't give the creature the ability to respond to you telepathically.

**Detect Thoughts.** You always have the {spell:Detect Thoughts} spell prepared. You can cast it without a spell slot or spell components, and you must finish a Long Rest before you can cast it in this way again. You can also cast it using spell slots you have of the appropriate level. Your spellcasting ability for the spell is the ability increased by this feat.

properties.text: You can speak telepathically (one-way) to any creature you can see within 60 feet, in a language you both know.
Detect Thoughts is always prepared and can be cast once per long rest without a spell slot or components. Spellcasting ability is the ability increased by this feat.

name: Thrown Weapon Fighting
description: When you hit with a ranged attack roll using a weapon that has the Thrown property, you gain a +2 bonus to the damage roll.

name: Tough
description: Your Hit Point maximum increases by an amount equal to twice your character level when you gain this feat. Whenever you gain a character level thereafter, your Hit Point maximum increases by an additional 2 Hit Points.

name: Two-Weapon Fighting
description: When you make an extra attack as a result of using a weapon that has the Light property, you can add your ability modifier to the damage of that attack if you aren't already adding it to the damage.

properties.text: When making the extra attack granted by a Light weapon, add your ability modifier to that attack's damage if not already applied.

name: Unarmed Fighting
description:
When you hit with your Unarmed Strike and deal damage, you can deal Bludgeoning damage equal to 1d6 plus your Strength modifier instead of the normal damage of an Unarmed Strike. If you aren't holding any weapons or a Shield when you make the attack roll, the d6 becomes a d8.

At the start of each of your turns, you can deal 1d4 Bludgeoning damage to one creature {condition:Grappled} by you.

properties.text: Unarmed Strikes deal 1d6 + Strength modifier Bludgeoning damage, or 1d8 + Strength modifier if your hands are empty (no weapons or shield).
At the start of each of your turns, you can deal 1d4 Bludgeoning damage to one creature you have Grappled.

name: War Caster
prerequisite: Level 4+, Spellcasting or Pact Magic feature
description:
You gain the following benefits.

**Concentration.** You have {rule:Advantage} on Constitution saving throws that you make to maintain {status:Concentration}.

**Reactive Spell.** When a creature provokes an {action:Opportunity Attack} from you by leaving your reach, you can take a Reaction to cast a spell at the creature rather than making an Opportunity Attack. The spell must have a casting time of one action and must target only that creature.

**Somatic Components.** You can perform the Somatic components of spells even when you have weapons or a Shield in one or both hands.

properties.text: When a creature provokes an Opportunity Attack from you by leaving your reach, you can cast a 1-action spell targeting only that creature instead of making the Opportunity Attack.
You can perform Somatic components of spells even when holding weapons or a Shield in one or both hands.

name: Weapon Master
description:
You gain the following benefits.

**Mastery Property.** Your training with weapons allows you to use the mastery property of one kind of Simple or Martial weapon of your choice, provided you have proficiency with it. Whenever you finish a Long Rest, you can change the kind of weapon to another eligible kind.

properties.text: You can use the mastery property of one Simple or Martial weapon you are proficient with. You can change which weapon on a Long Rest.

name: Wood Elf Magic
description: You learn the magic of the primeval woods, which are revered and protected by your people. You learn one Druid cantrip of your choice. You also learn the {spell:Longstrider} and {spell:Pass without Trace} spells, each of which you can cast once without expending a spell slot. You regain the ability to cast these two spells in this way when you finish a Long Rest. Wisdom is your spellcasting ability for all three spells.

properties.text: Wisdom is the spellcasting ability for all spells granted by this feat.
